overall.description: First-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit storefronts, interaction with a street food vendor, crossing traffic with police vehicles passing by, and walking through a covered overpass toward a bright exit. The footage is clearly from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity rendering and atmospheric neon lighting.

events.description: passing pedestrians with glowing red umbrella walking in opposite direction
approaching glowing food vendor cart ahead on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along rain-slicked sidewalk beneath neon signs and concrete overpasses

pedestrian in yellow jacket walking away from camera

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, passing beneath glowing neon signs including a prominent 'MARUS' sign overhead. The concrete walls are covered in colorful graffiti, and the pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, including one with a distinctive red glowing umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor station under overpass

events.description: stopping at food vendor cart to observe vendor-customer interaction
customer takes a bite of food while vendor continues preparing meal on glowing grill

agents.ego_description: standing at glowing food cart observing vendor prepare food while customer eats

notable_agents.action: vendor in white tank top preparing food on glowing cyan and red grill
female customer eating food and gesturing with hands near her face

entered.detail: food cart emitting bright cyan and red neon light with grilled food visible on surface
flight of stairs leading up to overpass walkway with metal railings
circular purple neon sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a street food vendor cart glowing with intense cyan and red neon light beneath the overpass. A vendor prepares food on an illuminated grill while a female customer stands nearby eating. Concrete stairs lead upward to the right, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant artificial lighting.

events.description: NCPD police car drives past from left to right with headlights illuminating the wet street
stepping off curb to cross the street between moving vehicles

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street while futuristic vehicles and police cars pass by

notable_agents.action: NCPD police cruiser driving past with headlights on and emergency lights visible
futuristic black sedan moving through intersection with glowing accents

entered.detail: dark wet asphalt road surface with white crosswalk markings
black and white police car with NCPD markings and roof lights
painted white stripes marking pedestrian crossing on street

segments.scene_description: Leaving the vendor area and stepping onto the wet asphalt street to cross between moving traffic. An NCPD police car passes by on the left, followed by other futuristic vehicles. The white crosswalk lines are visible on the dark reflective road surface as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under massive overpass approaching bright exit

events.description: entering darker covered area beneath massive overpass structure with steam vents
approaching bright white light at end of covered passage creating silhouette effect

agents.ego_description: walking through covered passage following a pedestrian toward the bright exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward bright exit at end of passage

entered.detail: enormous cylindrical concrete support pillar with steam vents at base
intense white light flooding from opening at end of passage creating glare
steam or smoke rising from vents near ground level around support columns

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered walkway beneath massive concrete overpass supports, with steam rising from vents near the ground. The area is darker than the street, with parked cars visible to the right. Ahead, an intense bright white light floods from the exit of the passage, silhouetting a pedestrian walking in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from vibrant neon storefronts into a stark, light-filled tunnel exit. It begins by gliding along a wet sidewalk beneath glowing signs and graffiti-covered walls, passing a pedestrian with a red glowing umbrella. As the camera slows, the scene shifts toward a street food vendor glowing in intense cyan and red light beneath a concrete overpass. The movement then continues forward, stepping onto the reflective asphalt to cross between futuristic traffic and a passing NCPD police car before entering a darker covered walkway. Finally, the camera moves past rising steam and parked cars toward a blinding white light that floods the exit of the passage, silhouetting a distant pedestrian.
